steps.t: Braigiar has pointed you to a cache of foodstuffs he says is hidden in the north-western area of Fordirith. He believes it should be buried about twen…
Braigiar said the cache of foodstuffs would be buried about twenty paces west of the rune-marked tree.
Braigiar is at Echad Dagoras in Fordirith. You discovered the Rangers' cache and dug up the foodstuffs hidden there. Now you should return with them t…
